name: Nurit Faingold
review:
I had an excellent experience working with this lawyer. From the very first consultation, she was very professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely invested in my case. Every step of the process was explained clearly, timelines were realistic, and all my questions were answered promptly and thoroughly.

What truly sets her apart is her attention to detail and dedication. Gilmara treated my case with care and urgency, which gave me great peace of mind during what can be a stressful process. Thanks to expertise and guidance, my visa process went smoothly and successfully.

I highly recommend this lawyer to anyone looking for reliable, trustworthy, and highly competent legal support with visas and immigration matters.

name: Tiago Schmidt
review: Highly recommend this lawyer for visa and immigration matters. Professional, knowledgeable, and very responsive throughout the entire process. Everything was clearly explained and handled efficiently, which made the visa application smooth and stress-free. Truly reliable and supportive legal service.

name: Luis Fernando Salazar Alves
review: I met Gilmara during a very difficult time after a visa refusal. From the very beginning and throughout the entire process, she proved to be a highly dedicated professional, fully committed to delivering the best possible outcome for her client. She was able to reassure me and develop a strategy to overturn the immigration decision through an appeal at the ART. We won the appeal in a record time of approximately two months, and after another month the visa was approved in line with the strategy we had outlined. I am very grateful for the work she did, and I highly recommend her to anyone who needs the support of an excellent professional.

name: Caroline Andrade
review: I’m very grateful for Gilmara’s work and support throughout my entire process. She was always professional, organized, and very attentive, making sure I understood each step along the way. This journey required a lot of patience and trust, and having someone as dedicated as her made everything much easier. I truly appreciate all her effort and would definitely recommend her services.

name: Bruna Romano
review:
Highly recommend this firm for visa and immigration matters. The service was professional, efficient, and extremely well organised from start to finish. Communication was excellent, everything was clearly explained, and the entire process was handled with care and precision.

I felt fully supported throughout my application and always knew exactly where things stood. Gilmara was truly reliable and knowledgeable through it all.

name: Bruna Douek
review: Super reliable and transparent. I'm thankful to have found Gilmara's services, I felt complete support through my entire process.

name: Deborah DeRosa
review: Very professional! Clear advice was provided and I would use their services again!
